posts.author: Nikunj_Bhanushali
posts.text: image 1141×648 86.4 KB The company had guided for an extremely exceptional growth. That was a complete miss. If you look at the standalone business there has barely been any growth in the last few quarters. All of the numbers are coming from the acquisition of the Kuiper group. only improvement i see is despite Kuiper group having lower margins it has not impacted the overall consol margins.
